pi_items.metadata_value: Data is synthetically generated for the environment
pi_items.verified_value: Verified: All calendar events and contacts are created programmatically by setup_data.py with realistic but fictional names and company domain 'northbridge.org'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Odoo 17 running on localhost:8069 with default admin credentials (admin/admin). The synthetic dataset includes 8 contacts and 20+ calendar events created programmatically. Alice Johnson is a contact in the system (ID 41) and appears as an attendee on 9 distinct events including 'Q2 Financial Review', 'Team Standup', 'Marketing Campaign Review', and others. The Odoo Calendar module includes an Attendees filter in the right sidebar allowing filtering by attendee name. The task timeout is 240 seconds with max 20 steps and sparse reward. Task difficulty is marked as 'easy'.
